name: apt-test-reboot-zh
message:

系统：<OS>
后端：apt
当前内核：<KERNEL>
时间：<NOW>

整机重启：需要
相关包/安全更新：
linux-image-amd64
TEST-MODE-no-real-reboot

重启检测摘要：
内核：当前 test-current，建议 test-expected

name: apt-test-reboot-en
message:
⚠️ Security update action required

Host: golden-host
OS: <OS>
Backend: apt
Current kernel: <KERNEL>
Time: <NOW>

Full reboot: Required
Related packages/security updates:
linux-image-amd64
TEST-MODE-no-real-reboot

Restart detection summary:
Kernel: current test-current, expected test-expected
Kernel status code: 3
Services to review/restart (1):
• ssh.service

Recommendation: SSH into this server during a suitable maintenance window and run reboot if a full reboot is required. If only services need restarting, review them first and restart the affected services manually.
